description: Cognitive Canary capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, canary scenario sets, deterministic local judge evaluation, cognitive SLI summaries, promotion/block decisions, non-destructive shadow/response collector/judge/metrics/rollback plans, pack-local response collector writeback store, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose cognitive quality canary evaluation, promotion gates, non-destructive shadow/response collector/judge/metrics/rollback planning, pack-local response collector writeback persistence, and JSON evidence export as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded release console feature.
Keep Cognitive Canary method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import yunque-client/cognitive-canary only when the Cognitive Canary pack is installed and enabled.
